hero.headline: Clark County's Most Trusted Pool Experts
hero.subheadline: For over 18 years, Mountain View Pool & Spa has kept Clark County pools pristine with honest work and old-fashioned customer care. From repairs to full renovations, we treat every pool like it's our own — so you can just dive in.

services.label: Our Expertise
services.headline: Complete Pool & Spa Care<br class="hidden md:block"> From Repair to Renovation
services.subtitle: Whether your pool needs a quick fix or a total transformation, our licensed team has the skills and equipment to handle it right the first time.

cards.title: Pool Repair
cards.description: Expert diagnosis and repair of leaks, valve failures, pump malfunctions, and other equipment issues. Most repairs completed in a single visit.

cards.title: Pool Renovations
cards.description: Breathe new life into aging pools with full resurfacing, tile replacement, and modern redesigns that transform your backyard.

cards.title: Equipment Installation
cards.description: Professional installation of pumps, filters, heaters, and automation systems. We size everything correctly for peak efficiency and longevity.

cards.title: Pressure Washing
cards.description: Restore your pool deck, patio, and hardscaping to like-new condition. We remove algae, grime, and years of buildup safely and thoroughly.

cards.title: Commercial Pool Services
cards.description: Specialized maintenance, repair, and renovation for commercial pools, spas, and fountains serving businesses, HOAs, and public facilities.

cards.title: Hot Tub Maintenance
cards.description: Comprehensive spa care including water chemistry balancing, equipment checks, seasonal prep, and repairs to keep your hot tub running year-round.

steps.title: Tell Us About Your Pool
steps.description: Call or fill out our form with details about your pool or spa. We'll schedule a free on-site inspection at a time that works for you.

steps.title: Get an Honest Assessment
steps.description: Our licensed technicians evaluate your pool, explain exactly what's needed, and provide a transparent quote with no hidden fees or pressure.

steps.title: Enjoy Crystal Clear Water
steps.description: We complete the work on schedule and to the highest standard. If anything isn't perfect, we come back and make it right — that's our promise.

about.label: Why Clark County Trusts Us
about.headline: A Small Team That Treats Every Pool Like Their Own
about.description: Since 2008, Mountain View Pool & Spa has been the go-to pool company in Clark County. Owner Matt Geil built this company on a simple belief: every customer deserves honest answers, quality workmanship, and a team that actually cares. From brand new installations to antique pool restorations, our dedicated crew brings 18+ years of hands-on expertise to every single job.

features.title: Owner-Operated, Every Job
features.description: Matt and his team personally oversee every project. You're never handed off to a subcontractor or left wondering who's in your backyard.

features.title: Residential & Commercial Experts
features.description: From backyard pools to public fountains, we have the specialized training and equipment for jobs of every size across three counties.

features.title: Satisfaction Guaranteed
features.description: Not happy with the work? We come back and make it right at no extra charge. Our BBB A+ rating speaks for itself.

pricing.headline: Transparent Pricing. No Surprises.
pricing.subtitle: Every job starts with a free inspection and honest quote. We explain the work, the cost, and the timeline upfront — no hidden fees.

guarantee.headline: Our "Clean Water" Guarantee
guarantee.description: If you're not completely satisfied with any work we perform, we'll come back and fix it at no additional cost. We've built our reputation on doing things right the first time, and we stand behind every job with the same integrity that's earned us 18 years of trust in Clark County.

faqs.question: How quickly can you come out for an inspection?
faqs.answer: We typically schedule free inspections within 3-5 business days. For urgent repairs like major leaks or equipment failures, we offer priority scheduling and will do our best to get there sooner. Just give us a call.

faqs.question: Do you work on hot tubs and spas too?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. Hot tubs and spas are a core part of our business. We handle everything from routine maintenance and water chemistry to full equipment replacement and repairs for all major brands.

faqs.question: Are you licensed and insured?
faqs.answer: Yes. Mountain View Pool & Spa is fully licensed, bonded, and insured in Washington state. We also maintain a BBB A+ rating. You can have complete peace of mind that your property is protected.

faqs.question: What areas do you serve?
faqs.answer: We serve Clark County, Cowlitz County, and Skamania County in Washington, as well as the Portland, Oregon metro area. If you're unsure whether you're in our service area, just give us a call and we'll let you know.

faqs.question: Do you handle commercial pools and fountains?
faqs.answer: Yes, we provide full commercial pool, spa, and fountain services including ongoing maintenance, repairs, and renovations for businesses, HOAs, hotels, and public facilities throughout the region.

testimonials.name: Teresa H.
testimonials.text: We had a great experience with yearly maintenance of our swim spa. Matt is very patient with all of our first-timer questions and incredibly knowledgeable. The rest of the staff has been very helpful too. We are clients for life.

testimonials.name: Sam B.
testimonials.text: Thank you for your awesome customer service. You solved a huge problem for us quickly and professionally. We couldn't be happier with the result.

testimonials.name: Repeat Customer
testimonials.text: These guys have done several jobs for me. They always far exceed my expectations, and I know the job is done correctly. Matt is a true expert in his craft. Highly recommend for any pool work.

contact.headline:
Ready for Pool Care
You Can Count On?
contact.subtitle: Get a free, no-obligation inspection and honest quote. No pressure, no hidden fees — just straightforward service from a team that's been earning Clark County's trust since 2008.

footer.description: Clark County's trusted pool experts since 2008. Serving WA & Portland metro.
